title: Huawei POE injector - AD-560062T0E, 802.3af/at, 35W
category: Huawei / Powering / Active PoE / PoE injectors
description: The Huawei AD-560062T0E is a Gigabit POE injector with one output POE port for powering devices supporting 802.3af/at with a maximum consumption of up to 35W. The power injector is suitable especially for powering APs, IP cameras, VoIP phones, etc GPSR
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000 Gigabit LAN Yes Power Output Power / 1port [W] 35 PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 1 Output Voltage [V] 56
